allow: Bash(powershell -Command "Get-Process powershell -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Where-Object { $_CommandLine -match ''AegisEngine'' } | Stop-Process -Force; Write-Host ''Engine detenido''")
Bash(powershell -Command "Get-Process powershell | Where-Object { $_CommandLine -match ''AegisEngine'' } | Select-Object Id, CPU")
